title: Left on Red
lyrics: Just sing this song when you get lost and you want to throw it away Sing this song when you get lost and find another day Come together and relate Together we hate I know you're sitting there and you think it's far I know you want to be something more than a star But you're crumbling inside the ozone gas It's inside your mind, you're out too fast Too much gas, too much vroom vroom That's a lot more than a... That's how we roll in here That's what you're showing here Taking your shovel, having it over with me Are you digging my grave, bitch? Are you digging my grave, bitch? I told you open up and you saw the wall in me Who even forced that shit out of me Told me I was too much I was the one with too many feelings Even then you were like Please tell me how you think I can help you How you helping now? How you helping now with that shovel thing in my own grave? What the fuck, bitch? Please don't do it like that I said please don't do it like that Always in the dark Away from the start This is a waving light Dark A light that's running out I see your silhouette I see everything you left out If you were real you would be here But you want to run away If you could heal you'd be here But you're running away every day And every step that it Gets a little bit uncomfortable Time is never right for you Time is never right for you What are we gonna Wait, it's just me here Singing to myself in the mirror I know I can see you here I know I can see you at the corner of me Are we coming in clearly? Hate me now Break me now Take it all from me Lights up above me, we wish that Lights up above me, we should be I felt amazing, I felt incredible But I guess we ran it too much Ran the race out the bed Lost touch, now we're sitting here Was our love unfair? Was regret mounding up you? Took a left, right when I quit the deal I'm like, where the fuck you going, boo? Took a right, went left With a new light where you're going, boo It's hard to feel the abandonment Yeah, it's hard to feel that All we meant was just some cheap-ass thrill When you were sitting here Was a day good enough for you to be that? Treat me like an object, is that all I was? A big fucking cop for you to scream out to? Goodbye, bitch, goodbye, bitch, oh Don't cry, bitch, don't cry, bitch, I'm gone Away, away I'm gone away from you There's nothing left to say Just go away

lyricsSegments.text: Just sing this song when you get lost and you want to throw it away
Sing this song when you get lost and find another day
Come together and relate Together we hate
I know you're sitting there and you think it's far
I know you want to be something more than a star
But you're crumbling inside the ozone gas
It's inside your mind, you're out too fast
Too much gas, too much vroom vroom
That's a lot more than a...
That's how we roll in here
That's what you're showing here
Taking your shovel, having it over with me
Are you digging my grave, bitch?
Are you digging my grave, bitch?
I told you open up and you saw the wall in me
Who even forced that shit out of me
Told me I was too much
I was the one with too many feelings
Even then you were like
Please tell me how you think I can help you
How you helping now?
How you helping now with that shovel thing in my own grave?
What the fuck, bitch?
Please don't do it like that
I said please don't do it like that
Always in the dark
Away from the start
This is a waving light
Dark
A light that's running out
I see your silhouette
I see everything you left out
If you were real you would be here
But you want to run away
If you could heal you'd be here
But you're running away every day
And every step that it
Gets a little bit uncomfortable
Time is never right for you
Time is never right for you
What are we gonna
Wait, it's just me here
Singing to myself in the mirror
I know I can see you here
I know I can see you at the corner of me
Are we coming in clearly?
Hate me now
Break me now
Take it all from me
Lights up above me, we wish that
Lights up above me, we should be
I felt amazing, I felt incredible
But I guess we ran it too much
Ran the race out the bed
Lost touch, now we're sitting here
Was our love unfair?
Was regret mounding up you?
Took a left, right when I quit the deal
I'm like, where the fuck you going, boo?
Took a right, went left
With a new light where you're going, boo
It's hard to feel the abandonment
Yeah, it's hard to feel that
All we meant was just some cheap-ass thrill
When you were sitting here
Was a day good enough for you to be that?
Treat me like an object, is that all I was?
A big fucking cop for you to scream out to?
Goodbye, bitch, goodbye, bitch, oh
Don't cry, bitch, don't cry, bitch, I'm gone
Away, away
I'm gone away from you
There's nothing left to say
Just go away
